Passkeys.//: Fill these in after provisioning the dev tunnel and learning the app signing identities. See README.md.
Passkeys.//ServerDomain: The RP ID = public host (no scheme/port), e.g. 'abcd1234-5177.euw.devtunnels.ms'. Empty = Identity defaults for localhost.
Passkeys.//AllowedOrigins: Extra accepted origins. https://<ServerDomain> is always allowed. Add each Android 'android:apk-key-hash:<hash>' origin.
